name: Greek Mythology 3
description: Expand your knowledge with deeper myths, lesser-known figures, and divine lineages.

questions.question: Which Titan was condemned to hold up the celestial heavens for eternity?
questions.explain: Atlas was punished by Zeus after the Titanomachy to hold the sky apart from earth.

questions.question: Who is the Greek goddess of witchcraft, magic, crossroads, and ghosts?
questions.explain: Hecate is an ancient chthonic deity associated with sorcery and torches at night.

questions.question: What is the name of the ferryman who transports dead souls across the river Styx?
questions.explain: Charon requires a coin payment to row the deceased into the realm of Hades.

questions.question: Which hero successfully slayed the Chimera with the help of Pegasus?
questions.explain: Bellerophon killed the fire-breathing Chimera using a lead-tipped spear from above.

questions.question: Who was the wife of Hades and queen of the underworld for part of the year?
questions.explain: Persephone eats pomegranate seeds which binds her to return to Hades every winter.

questions.question: Which of these figures opened a box that released all evils into the human world?
questions.explain: Pandora was the first human woman created by the gods, endowed with curiosity.

questions.question: Who is the god of wine, theater, and religious ecstasy, born from Zeus's thigh?
questions.explain: Dionysus was saved by Zeus after his mother Semele died from seeing Zeus's true form.

questions.question: What is the name of the multi-headed serpent defeated by Heracles as his second labor?
questions.explain: The Hydra grew two heads back for every single head that Heracles cut off.

questions.question: Which Greek god was thrown off Mount Olympus by his mother due to his deformity?
questions.explain: Hera cast Hephaestus down to earth because he was born small and disabled.

questions.question: Who led the Argonauts on the quest to retrieve the legendary Golden Fleece?
questions.explain: Jason captained the ship Argo to Colchis to reclaim his rightful inheritance.
